Every Brett Favre TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Brett Favre has thrown 552 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Brett Favre has thrown 45 playoff TDs which is about 8.2 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Brett Favre has connected with Antonio Freeman for 67 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 61 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Brett Favre has accumulated 10,316 yards. That's more passing yards than Robert Griffin III (9,355) threw in his entire career.
